Protein names: Gibberellic acid methyltransferase 2 (Gibberellin A(4) carboxyl methyltransferase) (EC 2.1.1.276)
Protein families: Methyltransferase superfamily, Type-7 methyltransferase family, SABATH subfamily
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. Type-7 methyltransferase family. SABATH subfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=gibberellin A4 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = O-methyl gibberellin A4 + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:36107, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73251, ChEBI:CHEBI:73252; EC=2.1.1.276; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:17220201};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Methylates the carboxyl group of several gibberellins (GAs). Substrate preference is GA4 > GA34 > GA9 > GA3 > GA1 > GA51 > GA20. No activity with diterpenes abietic acid and ent-kaurenoic acid. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:17220201}.
